message:
fix(scanner,daemon): wire real walker/scorer into daemon, fix compilation, deduplicate path utils

- Replace stub scanner in loop_main.rs with DirectoryWalker + ArtifactPatternRegistry +
  ProtectionRegistry integration (was using hardcoded name matching)
- Fix CRITICAL: struct field used `PressureLevel::Green` as type instead of `PressureLevel`
- Fix CRITICAL: ProtectionRegistry::new().unwrap_or_default() — type has no Default impl;
  replaced with proper match + error logging + continue
- Remove unused HashSet import, add clippy::too_many_lines allow for scanner_thread_main
- Add predictive safety net: trigger scan when urgency > 0.8 even at Green level
- Propagate full ScannerConfig (not just min_file_age) to scanner thread on config reload
- Extract shared resolve_absolute_path() into core::paths (was duplicated in fs_stats.rs
  and walker.rs as resolve_lookup_path/normalize_path_for_open_check)
- Fix ewma::project_time: remove premature numerator<=0 fallback that masked valid
  negative-acceleration predictions
- Add StructuralSignals::has_strong_signal() convenience method to patterns.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
